word: H2657 - חֶפְצִי בָּהּ - Chephtsîy bâhh - khef-tsee'baw - Hephzi-bah

sections.paragraph:
Original: חפצי בּהּ

Transliteration: chephtsı̂y bâhh

Phonetic: khef-tsee'baw

BDB Definition:

Hephzi-bah = "my delight is in her"
  1. the queen of King Hezekiah and mother of Manasseh
  2. a name for Jesusalem (figuratively)

Origin: from H2656 with suffixes

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
